title: 以下、Kernel/FUGUEに活用できる？ Server: SimpleHTTP/0.6 Python/3.11.9
summary_text: - Replace `repo pinning with hash verification` with: `pin to immutable commit SHA and enforce a signed SHA256 manifest for SKILL.md, scripts/**, references/**; block execution on any mismatch`. - Replace `explicit invocation for high-risk lanes` with: `require explicit invocation for lanes that can write state, access secrets, call external side-effecting APIs, or touch production resources`. - Replace `parity/replay tests` with: `promotion requires deterministic replay pass and cross-provider schema parity pass (Codex/Claude/GLM or approved fallback quorum)`. - Replace `hard-blocking of orchestration behavior inside skills` with: `skills must be unable to perform routing, quorum voting, policy-gate decisions, or cross-lane control; enforce with contract tests`. - Replace stop condition with: `halt integration immediately if any skill bypasses policy gates, performs orchestration decisions, or fails replay/parity/audit checks; require architecture review before resume`.
